subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath found the sweetness of the call that hath been raised from the realms of grandeur and hath acted in accordance with that which was commanded unto him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن وجد حلاوه الندآء الذی ارتفع من شطر الکبریاء و عمل ما امر به من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God
